name: Deluxe Nutty Chocolate Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1 1/4 cups all-purpose flour and 1/3 cup firmly-packed brown sugar. Cut in 1/2 cup butter until mixture is crumbly.
2. Press evenly into a 13x9-inch baking pan. Bake at 350°F for 8 to 10 minutes, or until lightly browned.
3. Melt 4 squares of chocolate over hot water; let cool.
4. Combine 2 lightly beaten eggs, 1/2 cup corn syrup, and 1/2 cup firmly-packed brown sugar in a bowl. Blend in 2 tablespoons all-purpose flour and melted chocolate.
5. Pour mixture over the baked crust. Sprinkle 1 cup chopped nuts evenly over the surface.
6. Bake at 350°F for 15 to 18 minutes, or until set.
7. Cool completely before cutting into bars. Makes about 3 dozen bars.
